                    "id": "delete_batch_operation"
                }
            ],
            "defaultValue": "create_audience"
        },
        {
            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "API 密钥",
            "placeholder": "请输入您的 Mailchimp API 密钥（包含服务器前缀）",
            "password": true,
            "required": true
        },
        {
            "id": "audienceName",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "受众群体名称",
            "placeholder": "受众群体的名称"
        },
        {
            "id": "contact",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "联系信息",
            "placeholder": "包含 company、address1、city、state、zip、country 的 JSON 对象"
        },
        {
            "id": "permissionReminder",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "权限提醒",
            "placeholder": "权限提醒文本"
        },
        {
            "id": "campaignDefaults",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "营销活动默认设置",
            "placeholder": "包含 from_name、from_email、subject、language 的 JSON 对象"
        },
        {
            "id": "emailTypeOption",
            "type": "dropdown",
            "title": "邮件类型选项",
            "options": [
                {
                    "label": "是",
                    "id": "true"
                },
                {
                    "label": "否",
                    "id": "false"
                }
            ]
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "API 密钥",
            "placeholder": "请输入您的 Mailchimp API 密钥（包含服务器前缀）",
            "password": true,
            "required": true
        },
        {
            "id": "listId",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "受众 ID",

            "id": "status",
            "type": "dropdown",

                    "label": "已订阅",

                    "label": "已清理",

                    "label": "待确认",

                },

                    "label": "事务性",
                    "id": "transactional"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "id": "count",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "数量",
            "placeholder": "结果数量（默认：10，最大：1000）",
            "max": 1000
        },
        {
            "id": "offset",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "偏移量",
            "placeholder": "跳过的结果数量"
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "API 密钥",
            "placeholder": "输入您的 Mailchimp API 密钥（包含服务器前缀）",
            "password": true,
            "required": true
        },
        {
            "id": "listId",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "受众 ID",
            "placeholder": "受众/列表 ID"
        },
        {
            "id": "emailAddress",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "电子邮件地址",
            "placeholder": "成员电子邮件地址"
        },
        {
            "id": "status",
            "type": "dropdown",
            "title": "状态",
            "options": [
                {
                    "label": "已订阅",
                    "id": "subscribed"
                },
                {
                    "label": "已退订",
                    "id": "unsubscribed"
                },
                {
                    "label": "已清理",
                    "id": "cleaned"
                },
                {
                    "label": "待确认",
                    "id": "pending"
                },
                {
                    "label": "事务性",
                    "id": "transactional"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "id": "mergeFields",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "合并字段",
            "placeholder": "包含合并字段值的 JSON 对象（例如：{\"FNAME\": \"John\", \"LNAME\": \"Doe\"}）"
        },
        {
            "id": "interests",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "兴趣",
            "placeholder": "包含兴趣 ID 及布尔值的 JSON 对象"
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

        {
            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "API 密钥",
            "placeholder": "请输入您的 Mailchimp API 密钥（包含服务器前缀）",
            "password": true,
            "required": true
        },
        {
            "id": "listId",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "受众 ID",
            "placeholder": "受众/列表 ID"
        },
        {
            "id": "subscriberEmail",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "订阅者邮箱",
            "placeholder": "电子邮件地址或 MD5 哈希值"
        },
        {
            "id": "emailAddress",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "电子邮件地址",
            "placeholder": "成员电子邮件地址"
        },
        {
            "id": "statusIfNew",
            "type": "dropdown",
            "title": "新增时状态",
            "options": [
                {
                    "label": "已订阅",
                    "id": "subscribed"
                },
                {
                    "label": "已取消订阅",
                    "id": "unsubscribed"
                },
                {
                    "label": "已清理",
                    "id": "cleaned"
                },
                {
                    "label": "待确认",
                    "id": "pending"
                },
                {
                    "label": "交易型",
                    "id": "transactional"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "id": "mergeFields",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "合并字段",
            "placeholder": "包含合并字段值的 JSON 对象（例如：{\"FNAME\": \"John\", \"LNAME\": \"Doe\"}）"
        },
        {
            "id": "interests",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "兴趣",
            "placeholder": "包含兴趣 ID 及布尔值的 JSON 对象"
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

      </g>
    </svg>`}

            "password": true,
            "required": true

        {

            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "电子邮件地址",

        },
        {
            "id": "status",
            "type": "dropdown",
            "title": "状态",
            "options": [
                {
                    "label": "已订阅",

                },
                {
                    "label": "已退订",
                    "id": "unsubscribed"
                },

                    "label": "已清除",

                },
                {
                    "label": "待确认",
                    "id": "pending"
                },
                {
                    "label": "事务性",
                    "id": "transactional"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "id": "mergeFields",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "合并字段",
            "placeholder": "包含合并字段值的 JSON 对象（例如：{\"FNAME\": \"John\", \"LNAME\": \"Doe\"}）"
        },
        {
            "id": "interests",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "兴趣",
            "placeholder": "包含兴趣 ID 及布尔值的 JSON 对象"
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

            "title": "收件人",
            "placeholder": "包含 list_id 及可选 segment_opts 的 JSON 对象"
        }

        {
            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "API 密钥",
            "placeholder": "请输入您的 Mailchimp API 密钥（包含服务器前缀）",

            "required": true

        {
            "id": "listId",

        },
        {
            "id": "segmentId",
            "type": "short-input",

            "placeholder": "细分群组 ID"
        },
        {
            "id": "count",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "数量",
            "placeholder": "结果数量（默认：10，最大：1000）",
            "max": 1000
        },
        {
            "id": "offset",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "偏移量",
            "placeholder": "跳过的结果数量"
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

                    "label": "删除落地页",
                    "id": "delete_landing_page"
                },
                {
                    "label": "发布落地页",
                    "id": "publish_landing_page"
                },
                {
                    "label": "取消发布落地页",
                    "id": "unpublish_landing_page"
                },
                {
                    "label": "获取批量操作列表",
                    "id": "get_batch_operations"
                },
                {
                    "label": "获取批量操作",
                    "id": "get_batch_operation"
                },
                {
                    "label": "创建批量操作",
                    "id": "create_batch_operation"
                },
                {
                    "label": "删除批量操作",
                    "id": "delete_batch_operation"
                }
            ],
            "defaultValue": "get_interests"
        },
        {
            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "API 密钥",
            "placeholder": "请输入您的 Mailchimp API 密钥（包含服务器前缀）",
            "password": true,
            "required": true
        },
        {
            "id": "listId",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "受众 ID",
            "placeholder": "受众/列表 ID"
        },
        {
            "id": "interestCategoryId",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "兴趣分类 ID",
            "placeholder": "兴趣分类 ID"
        },
        {
            "id": "count",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "数量",
            "placeholder": "结果数量（默认：10，最大：1000）",
            "max": 1000
        },
        {
            "id": "offset",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "偏移量",
            "placeholder": "跳过的结果数量"
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

---

## 使用说明

将 Mailchimp 集成到工作流中。可管理受众（列表）、列表成员、营销活动、自动化工作流、模板、报告、细分、标签、合并字段、兴趣分类、落地页、注册表单及批量操作。

## 注意事项

- 类别：`tools`
- 类型：`mailchimp`
